summary: The human is not the message bus — machine-verifiable gates are watched by the blocked agent, agent-to-agent handoffs travel as addressed messages in the shared channel, and only judgment gates escalate to the human, who keeps visibility and stop/redirect authority.

rules.rule: The human is never the transport layer between agents: a handoff is not sent until an addressed comm exists in the shared channel, committed and pushed — a local TASK file, your own memory, notebook, or chat window is not delivery.

watch.note: declared unwatched — no gate cites this canon yet; growth candidate

rules.rule: Every active branch/worktree touched during a session must end in exactly one intentional, declared exit state (PUSHED, READY-PR, DISCARDED, or COMMITTED-LOCAL with its warning); local-only WIP older than the current session is the failure class, and an undeclared branch is treated by anyone else as DISCARDED.

An agent never auto-decides a judgment gate: auto-proceeding is safe only for facts a machine can confirm, and if you cannot name the machine check that confirms a condition, it is a judgment gate — escalate it, do not assume it.

watch.note: declared unwatched — no gate cites this canon yet; growth candidate

rules.rule: Before launching a subagent with a non-default model/runtime, record one machine-readable route record (role, adapter, model, auth_mode, capability, gates, evidence, review_policy, human_approval) — gates travel with the work, a different model never bypasses them, and conflicting route fields block the launch.

watch.note: declared unwatched — no gate cites this canon yet; growth candidate

rules.rule: A red machine gate is read, not assumed: read the specific failure line, do not declare a failure pre-existing without confirming it against the baseline, and re-run infrastructure flakes rather than merging around them.

watch.note: declared unwatched — no gate cites this canon yet; growth candidate

rules.rule: Silence is not approval and opinion is not decision: no agent may treat lack of response as permission to cross a pending boundary, and a decision-bearing message without an explicit marker defaults to OPINION — agents do not infer FINAL_DECISION from context.

watch.note: declared unwatched — no gate cites this canon yet; growth candidate
